KeysToEntries.Muzzle_KacM4QdFlashHider_Description: A flash hider engineered by Knight's Armament Company (KAC). Designed for 5.56x45mm caliber firearms, particularly the M4 and AR-15 platforms, this device effectively mitigates muzzle flash, reducing the shooter's visual signature and enhancing target acquisition. It also serves as a platform for attaching a sound suppressor.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_AntregVulcanM1COMP_Description: A device engineered to enhance the performance of 5.56x45mm caliber firearms. Designed by ANTREG with efficiency in mind, this muzzle brake effectively reduces recoil and muzzle rise, allowing for improved accuracy and faster target acquisition. It also serves as a platform for attaching a sound suppressor.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_AntregVulcanF1_Description: A flash hider designed for 5.56x45mm caliber firearms. Manufactured by ANTREG, a trusted name in firearm accessories, it effectively mitigates muzzle flash, reducing the shooter's visibility and maintaining their position covert while also serving as a platform for attaching a sound suppressor.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_KacQdssNt4Suppressor_Descript: A high-quality suppressor designed for 5.56mm caliber weapons. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company (KAC), this suppressor offers exceptional noise reduction, enhancing stealth and minimizing muzzle flash.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Ak100SeriesMuzzleBrake_Descriptio: AN AK-74 Muzzle Brake made by Izhmash in the USSR.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_AkmMuzzleBrake_Description: The Arsenal AK-47 7.62x39 muzzle brake reduces recoil and muzzle drift, improving shot recovery. It is ideal for competition and accuracy shooting.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Pbs04Suppressor_Description: This is one of the most acknowledged suppressors of the AK family of rifles. Unlike the PBS-1, this suppressor is designed for the 5.45x39mm cartridge.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Pbs01Suppressor_Description: Original Soviet suppressor for AK-47, AKM, and M70 rifles chambered in 7.62x39mm, including a sight for shooting with subsonic ammunition.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_AkArsenalFlashHiderBulgarian_Desc: This Bulgarian-made 4-piece flash hider is designed for mil-spec standard AK rifles chambered in 7.62x39 and features 14mmx1 left-hand threads.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_ZenitcoDtk1MuzzleBrake_Descriptio: The DTK-1 muzzle brake is specifically designed for AK rifles with a thread size of 24x1.5. It effectively reduces recoil and compensates for barrel movement. Additionally, the crown is designed to break glass.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_ZenitcoDtk2MuzzleBrake_Descriptio: The DTK-2 muzzle brake compensator is designed for use with 7.62mm and 5.45mm AK carbines, effectively reducing recoil and compensating for muzzle rise.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M1ASocom16MuzzleBrake_Description: The M1A SOCOM 16 muzzle brake is a compact device for the Springfield Armory SOCOM-16 rifle. This short brake reduces recoil and muzzle rise from the 16.25-inch barrel while preserving the rifle’s compact profile.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Caa3LugthreadedHkMp5_Description: This adapter allows for the attachment of Heckler & Koch MP5/SP5 and Wyssen Defence WD9 muzzle devices, such as suppressors, flash hiders, and silencers, to 9mm Luger caliber firearms with muzzle threads.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_BtMp5FlashHider_Description: This flash hider can be easily attached to the end of the 3-lug barrel. Its quick-detach feature allows for effortless installation and removal, providing convenience and ease of use.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Mp53LugAdapter_Description: This adapter enables users to add 3-lug attachments, such as flash hiders, compensators, suppressors, and silencers, to their MP5.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_XFactorChoke_Description: This precision-engineered accessory enhances shotgun performance. Its ported design reduces muzzle jump and recoil, allowing for faster follow-up shots and increased accuracy. Featuring an Improved Cylinder constriction pattern, it guarantees an optimal spread tailored for close-range targets, rendering it well-suited for hunting and tactical scenarios demanding swift, precise shooting.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_DbTacMuzzleBreak_Description: This muzzle brake is made of durable aluminum with an anodized black finish and is designed to significantly reduce recoil during competition shooting.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_CarlsonsTacticalMuzzleBrake_Descr: This muzzle device is designed to significantly reduce recoil. It extends about 2.75 inches beyond the barrel's end and has a matte black finish, improving the appearance of any shotgun while also providing better firearm control and faster follow-up shots.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_SrdQdMuzzleBrake_Description: The SRD762-QD Taper-Lok Muzzle Brake self-centers the firearm and suppressor, which reduces group dispersion and improves accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_SrdQdTaperLokMuzzleBrake_Descript: The SRD762-QD Taper-Lok Muzzle Brake self-centers the firearm and suppressor, which reduces group dispersion and improves accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_SrdQdTaperLokCqbFlashHider_Descri: The SRD762-QD Flash Hider optimizes alignment, improves accuracy, and reduces point of impact shift. It is low-profile yet very effective at reducing muzzle flash.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SigSlhTiQdSuppressor_Descript: The SIG Sauer SLH300TI-QD is a titanium suppressor specifically designed for the .300 Blackout cartridge. It provides a lightweight yet durable solution for sound suppression and is optimized for both supersonic and subsonic .300 Blackout ammunition, ensuring reliable performance in various shooting scenarios.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SigSlhQdSuppressor_Descriptio: The SLH series rifle suppressors feature the latest Clutch-LOK QD mounting system and an internal multi-flow path, which prioritizes sound reduction while reducing up to 50% of toxic fumes venting through the ejection port.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_KiVelocityMuzzleBrakeForGlock17_D: This low-profile addition improves aesthetics and significantly reduces recoil and muzzle climb, providing better control and accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_CompWeightCompensatorForGlock17_D: This low-profile addition seamlessly integrates with the firearm's design, eliminating the need for a threaded barrel. The Comp Weight enhances aesthetics and functions as an effective compensator, directing pressure downward to reduce recoil and enhance accuracy, minimizing muzzle flip for improved performance.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_BanishSuppressor_Description: Compatible with calibers ranging from .45 ACP to Rimfire, the Banish 45 is a versatile and modular pistol suppressor. It fits a wide range of pistols, offering user-friendly efficiency. Reducing noise by 36 dB, it delivers a quieter and adaptable shooting experience across multiple calibers.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_UltimaSuppressor_Description: This suppressor is designed specifically for 9mm firearms and effectively reduces noise and muzzle signature. It can be mounted directly on threaded barrels.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Colt1911MuzzleBrake_Description: Constructed of high-quality materials, this muzzle brake for the Colt 1911 ensures durability and reliable performance in a variety of shooting conditions.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SurefireSocomRc1Suppressor_De: A military-grade silencer crafted from a durable blend of stainless steel and Inconel 718. The suppressor provides premium sound reduction, eliminates first-round muzzle flash, and minimizes dust signature. It is specifically designed for 5.56mm rifles, ensuring lasting durability that may even outlast the host barrel.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_ColtA2FlashHider_Description: A flash hider for 5.56x45mm caliber weapons. Manufactured by Colt and designed to be compatible with the AR-15 weapon platform. It effectively reduces muzzle flash, providing improved visibility and reducing the potential for visual disruption during rapid-fire or low-light shooting scenarios.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Pcam472_Description: The PCAM4-72 features a triple baffle design, which significantly reduces recoil. Precision-canted side vents eliminate muzzle climb, ensuring minimal movement and reduced dust signature when prone. Built for durability and impact resistance, it features a lightweight design that can withstand combat conditions without rapid erosion.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SuppressorAac_Description: The AAC 762-SDN-6 is a fast-attach silencer designed for 7.62x51mm ammo, as well as smaller calibers like .300BLK and 5.56mm. It is compact, versatile, and extremely durable for full-time silencer use on select guns. The silencer provides a 98.9% reduction in muzzle sound pressure, prioritizing the preservation of the shooter's hearing and minimizing the muzzle blast signature.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SuppressorDtss_Description: The DTSS Suppressor is designed to improve accuracy and reduce impact shift between suppressed and unsuppressed firing. Desert Tech sound suppressors can improve rifle accuracy by 1/4 MOA or better. This is achieved through weldless mono-core designs that efficiently strip away gas, minimizing disturbance and maximizing projectile stability at the muzzle exit.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Type51Suppressor_Description: A muzzle device designed for the Type 51 Tokarev pistol that reduces noise and muzzle flash when firing. The suppressor is typically made of durable materials like steel or aluminum and attaches to the threaded barrel of the Type 51 Tokarev, effectively reducing the sound signature of each shot. This accessory improves the pistol's versatility, making it suitable for applications where reduced noise and flash are desired.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_ColtXm177E2ModeratorFlashHider_55: This early flash hider for 5.56x45mm caliber weapons effectively reduces muzzle flash, improving shooter visibility and reducing the risk of giving away their position in low-light conditions. Originally manufactured by Colt in early 1967, this particular model was consistently utilized on the XM177E2. However, production of the Moderators by Colt ceased in the mid-1970s, following a ruling by the ATF categorizing the device as a sound "suppressor."
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Vz61TosSuppressor_Description: The Vz. 61 suppressor is a compact and lightweight accessory that reduces firearm noise. Weighing 360g, it offers substantial noise reduction with a 21dB attenuation. It securely attaches to the barrel via a standard clamp mechanism, ensuring convenient and reliable mounting.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Mp7FlashHider_Description: The H&K MP7 flash hider reduces muzzle flash, preserving night vision and minimizing the weapon's visible signature. It is constructed from high-quality steel and features a durable melonite finish for enhanced longevity and performance.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_RotexMp7Suppressor_Descriptio: This high-performance sound suppressor was developed in collaboration with Heckler & Koch, specifically for the MP7 submachine gun chambered in 4.6×30mm. It is designed to mount directly onto the factory MP7 muzzle device, ensuring seamless integration without the need for additional adapters.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_DanielDefenseFlashSuppressorExten: The Daniel Defense Flash Suppressor is designed to reduce muzzle flash. Since it’s manufactured from aerospace grade 17-4 stainless steel and finished with a salt bath nitride, there is minimal chance of corrosion.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_MosinTacfireTankerStyleMuzzleBrak: The M44 Tanker-style Bolt-on Muzzle Brake is made of durable steel and has a robust construction with a heat-treated, erosion-resistant black oxide finish. It has side and top ports that minimize muzzle flip, recoil, and barrel whip, enhancing shooting stability and control by efficiently redirecting gases.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_MosinHowlingRavenMuzzleBrake_Desc: This muzzle brake is designed specifically for the original Mosin-Nagant 91/30 model and is intended to fit snugly around the front sight post. It is secured in place by three brass set screws. Made in America from steel with a black oxide coating, this muzzle brake significantly reduces recoil.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_MosinBramitSuppressor_Descrip: This suppressor was created In June 1940 by the Mitin brothers. Named BraMit (short for Brothers Mitin), it was attached to the barrel in the same way as a bayonet, with a length of 147mm and a diameter of 32mm. In December 1940, after successful tests, BraMit was accepted for service, and serial production began in the second half of 1941.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_HkMp5Sd9mmSuppressor_Descript: Constructed from aluminum and finished in black, this suppressor measures 12 inches in length and attaches to the MP5SD barrel with M18x1 metric threads. It is renowned as the quietest HK suppressor ever produced.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_CzBren2StandardFlashHider_Descrip: <DEV> Spiral three-prong flash hider with the option for easy thread-on attachment of a sound suppressor featuring ROTEX-V mounting interface. The unique design of the flash hider's prongs ensures self-tightening with each shot fired.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SvdRotor43Suppressor_Descript: This suppressor is specifically designed for the SVD Dragunov chambered in 7.62×54R. Featuring a coupler mounting system for secure attachment, it is constructed from a combination of high-strength steel and aluminum alloy, ensuring both durability and a manageable weight for extended use.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_SigFlashHider3Prong_Description: Three-pronged flash suppressor designed for 5.56mm SIG SAUER rifles.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SigSRD556_Description: The SIG Sauer SRD556 is a direct thread suppressor for 5.56 NATO rifles. Constructed from nickel-alloy stainless steel, it offers exceptional durability, particularly for short-barreled rifles that utilize supersonic ammunition.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Salvo12_Description: The SilencerCo Salvo 12 is a shotgun suppressor compatible with most pump-action and semi-automatic shotguns and nearly all commercially available ammunition. Its modular design allows users to adjust sound, weight, and length by adding or removing sections as needed.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Salvo12Adapter_Description: The Salvo 12 Choke Adapter functions as both a choke and a suppressor adapter. It enables compatibility between your shotgun and Salvo 12 suppressor, resulting in quieter shooting while also providing customizable choke options for improved performance and versatility.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_SigMCX-3ProngFlashHider_Descripti: Crafted from high-quality steel and coated in a sleek black finish, the Sig Sauer MCX 3-Prong Flash Hider is a fast-attach suppressor that minimizes flash and muzzle climb, thus enhancing the firearm’s performance.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Mp5MuzzleCap_Description: The MP5 Muzzle Cap is a protective accessory that covers and safeguards the MP5's muzzle. It prevents damage to the muzzle threads and keeps debris out of the barrel when the firearm is not used.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_SksAdapterMuzzleBrake_Description: This SKS adapter with M24 thread allows you to mount various muzzle brakes suitable for the 7.62x39 caliber. Simply mount the adapter on the barrel of the carbine and secure it with two screws behind the front sight.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M700ThreadCap_Description: The Remington M700 barrel thread protector is a durable steel device that shields the rifle's barrel threads from damage when a muzzle device is not in use. It prevents impacts and debris, ensuring thread integrity. The protector is easy to install and remove, allowing for quick interchangeability with other muzzle devices.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M9ThreadCap_Description: The M9 Thread Cap is a protective accessory designed to cover and secure the M9 barrel thread for added security and to prevent damage when not in use.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_AkmSlantBrake_Description: A standard muzzle brake for the AKM and other compatible rifles. Its main purpose is to reduce recoil and muzzle rise, which improves overall weapon control and follow-up shot accuracy.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Ak14-1LH-2415Adapter_Description: This adapter converts standard 14-1LH threaded AK muzzles to the modern Russian 24mm thread design, allowing for easy installation of AK-74 type muzzle devices with 24mm threads. The adapter includes notches to accommodate a detent locking pin.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_BarrettStyleTankerMuzzleBreake_De: The “Tanker” muzzle brake has six large side ports angled at 45 degrees, which effectively reduce recoil and stabilize the rifle. It also has six smaller vertical ports that reduce muzzle rise, allowing for faster realignment and more precise follow-up shots.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_SurefireSocom3ProngFlashHider_Des: Designed to minimize muzzle flash and recoil. Manufactured by Surefire, this flash hider is specifically engineered for 5.56x45mm caliber rifles. Its advanced design effectively reduces muzzle rise, providing improved weapon control and faster follow-up shots while also serving as a platform for attaching a sound suppressor.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_CQA2FlashHider_Description: The CQ A2 Flash Hider is a Chinese-made option designed to fit AR-15 rifles, which mimics the design of the classic A2 flash hider but may not meet the same quality standards as its American-made counterpart. It is ideal for budget-conscious shooters or those seeking a basic muzzle device option.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Salvo12AdapterMossberg_Descriptio: The Salvo 12 Choke Adapter serves as both a choke and suppressor adapter. It allows compatibility between the shotgun and the Salvo 12 suppressor, providing quieter shooting and customizable choke options for enhanced performance and versatility.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_KacQdssNt4SuppressorFDE_Descr: A high-quality suppressor designed for 5.56mm caliber weapons. Manufactured by Knight's Armament Company (KAC), this suppressor offers exceptional noise reduction, enhancing stealth and minimizing muzzle flash.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SurefireSocomRc1SuppressorFDE: A military-grade silencer crafted from a durable blend of stainless steel and Inconel 718. The suppressor provides premium sound reduction, eliminates first-round muzzle flash, and minimizes dust signature. It is specifically designed for 5.56mm rifles, ensuring lasting durability that may even outlast the host barrel.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Aks74UMuzzleBrake_Description: A high quality accessory designed for the AKS-74U rifle. Constructed of durable materials, it effectively reduces recoil and muzzle rise, improving control and accuracy during rapid fire.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Ak12Suppressor_Description: Designed to effectively reduce gunfire noise and muzzle flash, this AK-12 suppressor is constructed of high-strength steel and offers durability and reliability in various shooting conditions.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Ak15Suppressor_Description: Designed to effectively reduce gunfire noise and muzzle flash, this AK-15 suppressor is constructed of high-strength steel and offers durability and reliability in various shooting conditions.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Mp53LugAdapterThread_Description: Designed to provide versatility in attaching various muzzle devices such as suppressors, flash hiders, or compensators to an MP5 or similar firearm, this adapter typically combines a threaded section with the traditional 3-lug system found on the MP5.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Ak19Suppressor_Description: Made from durable materials, the AK-19 Suppressor effectively reduces noise and muzzle flash, improving shooting stealth and control.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Vlc556Mark1Suppressor_Descrip: The ANTREG VLC 556 Mark 1 suppressor designed for .223 Rem/5.56x45 NATO ammunition features high noise and flash reduction and is compatible with semi-auto and full-auto firearms. It uses a quick-release mechanism and is made of Inconel and stainless steel for extreme durability.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_ScorpionEvo3FlashHider_Descriptio: <DEV> designed to fit the Scorpion EVO 3. It provides enhanced aesthetics and functionality by reducing visible muzzle flash during firing.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_ScorpionEvo3LinearCompensator_Des: <DEV> The Linear Compensator G.I.S. HP9 for the CZ Scorpion EVO 3, is designed to direct gases and sound forward, reducing the noise and concussion experienced by the shooter and those nearby. Its lightweight, compact design ensures easy maintenance and long service life without requiring complex disassembly.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_ScorpionEvo3_Description: <DEV>The B&T Suppressor for CZ Scorpion EVO 3 is a high-quality, durable suppressor made by Brügger & Thomet. Designed for 9mm Luger firearms, it features an all-steel construction for rugged use, including full-auto applications.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_HypertrapMuzzleBrake762_Descripti: A precision-engineered muzzle device for 7.62mm rifles that reduces recoil and minimizes muzzle rise using a unique hybrid baffle and convergent-divergent port design. Its tunable gas bias allows for fine-tuned performance, while the universal timing nut ensures quick, hassle-free installation. Finished with a durable Ionbond CrCN coating, it provides enhanced wear resistance and long-lasting performance for tactical and precision shooting.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_HypertrapMuzzleBrake556_Descripti: A precision-engineered muzzle device for 5.56mm rifles that reduces recoil and minimizes muzzle rise using a unique hybrid baffle and convergent-divergent port design. Its tunable gas bias allows for fine-tuned performance, while the universal timing nut ensures quick, hassle-free installation. Finished with a durable Ionbond CrCN coating, it provides enhanced wear resistance and long-lasting performance for tactical and precision shooting.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_SlotMuzzleBrake_Description: The Slot Brake is a muzzle device designed for AR-style rifles chambered in 5.56 with a 1/2-28 thread. It minimizes recoil and redirects gases forward, reducing the blast experienced by the shooter and bystanders. Precision-machined from hardened stainless steel, it features a tapered crown and a closed bottom to minimize dust kick-up.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_FuryMuzzleBrake_Description: A lightweight, high-performance muzzle device engineered to reduce recoil and muzzle rise, enhancing shooting precision. Constructed from durable titanium, it directs gases away from the shooter and minimizes ground signature, making it ideal for prone shooting.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M14-1RHF-M14-1LHM_Name: M14x1 RH Female To M14x1 LH Male
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M14-1RHF-M14-1LHM_Description: The M14x1 RH Female to M14x1 LH Male Thread Adapter is a practical solution for converting barrel threads. It enables the connection of right-hand female threaded components to left-hand male threaded barrels, ensuring compatibility between different muzzle devices and setups.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M14-1RHM-M14-1LHF_Name: M14x1 LH Female To M14x1 RH Male
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M14-1RHM-M14-1LHF_Description: The M14x1 RH Male to M14x1 LH Female Thread Adapter is a practical solution for converting barrel threads. It enables the connection of right-hand male threaded components to left-hand female threaded barrels, ensuring compatibility between different muzzle devices and setups.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M14x1to1/228Adapter_Description: The M14x1 LH to 1/2x28 thread adapter is a versatile and essential accessory for firearm enthusiasts and gunsmiths. This adapter allows you to convert the threading on your firearm barrel from M14x1 left-hand (LH) threads to the more common 1/2x28 right-hand (RH) threads. This conversion is particularly useful for attaching a wider range of muzzle devices, such as suppressors, compensators, and flash hiders, that are designed for 1/2x28 threading.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M14x1to1228Adapter_Description: <DEV> The M14×1 LH to 1/2×28 Thread Adapter enables conversion from left-hand M14×1 barrel threads to standard right-hand 1/2×28 threads. This allows compatibility with a wide range of muzzle devices, including suppressors, compensators, and flash hiders designed for 1/2×28 threading.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_SaVz58ZendlCompensator_Descriptio: This precision-machined steel compensator by Zendl is designed for the Sa vz. 58 rifle. It features CNC-cut lateral ports that help reduce recoil and muzzle rise, keeping shots on target during rapid fire. Heat-treated for durability, it performs reliably under harsh conditions. The compensator installs easily on the threaded barrel, enhancing control and accuracy for a more disciplined, combat-ready setup.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_MamsMuzzleBrake556_Description: A steel muzzle brake for 5.56×45mm rifles with 1/2×28 threads. It reduces recoil and muzzle rise. It is compatible with KAC QDC suppressors.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_KacQdcSuppressor_Description: A quick-detach suppressor for 5.56 NATO, featuring Knight’s patented pressure-reduction technology. It mounts to any compatible KAC QDC muzzle device with minimal point-of-impact shift. The suppressor offers approximately 12 dB of sound reduction, lowers back pressure, and includes a protective shroud for improved heat management.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SigSlhTiQdSuppressorGN_Descri: The SIG Sauer SLH300TI-QD is a titanium suppressor specifically designed for the .300 Blackout cartridge. It provides a lightweight yet durable solution for sound suppression and is optimized for both supersonic and subsonic .300 Blackout ammunition, ensuring reliable performance in various shooting scenarios.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M1AMuzzleBrake_Description: This steel muzzle brake is engineered for the M14 and M1A platforms. Featuring a multi-port baffle system, it effectively reduces recoil and muzzle rise. Its matte black finish offers a low-profile look while enhancing overall rifle stability during sustained fire.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M1AFlashHider_Description: This standard-issue muzzle device for the M14 and M1A is designed to suppress visible muzzle flash without altering the rifle’s recoil profile. Its design makes it well-suited for low-light conditions and operations in dense vegetation where concealment is critical.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M1AThreadAdapter5824_Description: The Smith Enterprise M14/M1A Thread Adapter converts the muzzle threads on a Springfield M1A to the standard 5/8x-24 size, allowing compatibility with a wider range of flash hiders, muzzle brakes, and suppressors.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_SurefireSocom3Prong762FlashHider_: The SureFire SOCOM 3-Prong Flash Hider is a precisely machined muzzle device designed for 5.56/223 rifles. Constructed from heat-treated stainless steel with a DLC coating, it reduces over 99% of the flash and offers a secure mount for SOCOM suppressors. It includes multiple bearing surfaces for proper alignment and a shim kit for correct installation.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Nomad30Suppressor_Description: The Dead Air Nomad‑30 is a lightweight, modular suppressor rated for use with .300 Norma Mag. Made from 17-4 stainless steel with a titanium cap, it offers high-level sound suppression in a compact 14-ounce, 6.5-inch design. It features a 5/8×24 direct-thread mount and is compatible with KeyMo/Xeno.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SurefireSocom762Rc2Suppressor: A fully automatic-rated suppressor for 7.62×51 mm (.308) rifles that uses SureFire’s Fast-Attach mounting system. It is made of high-temperature Inconel and stainless steel, providing effective sound, flash, and dust signature reduction with minimal point-of-impact shift.

A fully automatic-rated suppressor for 7.62×51 mm (.308) rifles that uses SureFire’s Fast-Attach mounting system. It is made of high-temperature Inconel and stainless steel, providing effective sound, flash, and dust signature reduction with minimal point-of-impact shift.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Vlc556Mark1SuppressorFDE_Desc: The ANTREG VLC 556 Mark 1 suppressor designed for .223 Rem/5.56x45 NATO ammunition features high noise and flash reduction and is compatible with semi-auto and full-auto firearms. It uses a quick-release mechanism and is made of Inconel and stainless steel for extreme durability.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SigSlhQdSuppressorGC_Descript: The SLH series rifle suppressors feature the latest Clutch-LOK QD mounting system and an internal multi-flow path, which prioritizes sound reduction while reducing up to 50% of toxic fumes venting through the ejection port.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SigSlhQdSuppressorFDE_Descrip: The SLH series rifle suppressors feature the latest Clutch-LOK QD mounting system and an internal multi-flow path, which prioritizes sound reduction while reducing up to 50% of toxic fumes venting through the ejection port.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SigSlhTiQdSuppressorFDE_Descr: The SIG Sauer SLH300TI-QD is a titanium suppressor specifically designed for the .300 Blackout cartridge. It provides a lightweight yet durable solution for sound suppression and is optimized for both supersonic and subsonic .300 Blackout ammunition, ensuring reliable performance in various shooting scenarios.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_ZenitcoDtk1MuzzleBrakeJC_Descript: The DTK-1 muzzle brake is specifically designed for AK rifles with a thread size of 24x1.5. It effectively reduces recoil and compensates for barrel movement. Additionally, the crown is designed to break glass.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SurefireSocomRc1SuppressorPL_: A military-grade silencer crafted from a durable blend of stainless steel and Inconel 718. The suppressor provides premium sound reduction, eliminates first-round muzzle flash, and minimizes dust signature. It is specifically designed for 5.56mm rifles, ensuring lasting durability that may even outlast the host barrel.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_DbTacMuzzleBreakRT_Description: This muzzle brake is made of durable aluminum with an anodized black finish and is designed to significantly reduce recoil during competition shooting.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_RotexMp7SuppressorSC_Descript: This high-performance sound suppressor was developed in collaboration with Heckler & Koch, specifically for the MP7 submachine gun chambered in 4.6×30mm. It is designed to mount directly onto the factory MP7 muzzle device, ensuring seamless integration without the need for additional adapters.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_AlienSuppressor_Description: The Alien Suppressor is purpose-built for the Laugo Arms Alien pistol. It mounts via a direct-thread connection concealed beneath the barrel shroud, maintaining the pistol’s streamlined profile while delivering quiet, ultra-flat shooting performance.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_BanishSuppressorAvi_Descripti:
Compatible with calibers ranging from .45 ACP to Rimfire, the Banish 45 is a versatile and modular pistol suppressor. It fits a wide range of pistols, offering user-friendly efficiency. Reducing noise by 36 dB, it delivers a quieter and adaptable shooting experience across multiple calibers.

This is a part of the Colt Commander belonging to Aawut "Viper" Phasuk, the leader of the armed group occupying Pha Lang Airfield.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SigSlhQdSuppressorCamo_Descri:
The SLH series rifle suppressors feature the latest Clutch-LOK QD mounting system and an internal multi-flow path, which prioritizes sound reduction while reducing up to 50% of toxic fumes venting through the ejection port.

This is a part of the Remington M700 belonging to Bane "Yen" Seeha, the military commander of Midnight Sapphire.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_AK308FlashHider_Description: A flash hider for the AK-308. It reduces muzzle flash by dispersing ignited gases at the muzzle, lowering your visual signature when firing.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Ak308Suppressor_Description: Made from durable materials, the AK-308 Suppressor effectively reduces noise and muzzle flash, improving shooting stealth and control.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_Ak308SuppressorHT_Description: Made from durable materials, the AK-308 Suppressor effectively reduces noise and muzzle flash, improving shooting stealth and control.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Ak100SeriesMuzzleBrakeMedved_Desc:
AN AK-74 Muzzle Brake made by Izhmash in the USSR.

This is a part of the AK-74N belonging to Arkady "Buran" Vititsky, the military commander of Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Aks74UMuzzleBrake Father_Descript:
A high quality accessory designed for the AKS-74U rifle. Constructed of durable materials, it effectively reduces recoil and muzzle rise, improving control and accuracy during rapid fire.

This is a part of the AKS-74U belonging to Lani "Firebrand" Sayavong, the leader of the armed group occupying YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.Suppressor_SvdRotor43SuppressorSW_Descri: This suppressor is specifically designed for the SVD Dragunov chambered in 7.62×54R. Featuring a coupler mounting system for secure attachment, it is constructed from a combination of high-strength steel and aluminum alloy, ensuring both durability and a manageable weight for extended use.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M1ASocom16MuzzleBrakeBH_Descripti: The M1A SOCOM 16 muzzle brake is a compact device for the Springfield Armory SOCOM-16 rifle. This short brake reduces recoil and muzzle rise from the 16.25-inch barrel while preserving the rifle’s compact profile.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Ak19FlashHider_Description: A flash hider for the AK19. It reduces muzzle flash by dispersing ignited gases at the muzzle, lowering your visual signature when firing.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_M16A1A2FlashHider_Description: A classic M16A1 flash hider designed for AR-15/M16 pattern rifles.
KeysToEntries.Muzzle_Aks74UMuzzleBrakeFather_Descripti:
A high quality accessory designed for the AKS-74U rifle. Constructed of durable materials, it effectively reduces recoil and muzzle rise, improving control and accuracy during rapid fire.

This is a part of the AKS-74U belonging to Lani "Firebrand" Sayavong, the leader of the armed group occupying YBL-1.
